response: Rudolf Schwarzkogler was closely associated with the Viennese Actionism group, which included artists like Günter Brus, Otto Mühl, and Hermann Nitsch. Howard Zieff, on the other hand, was an American television commercial director. Both individuals were connected to Howard Zieff through their roles in the film industry, with Schwarzkogler being part of the artistic movement that influenced the visual style of films like *The Main Event* and *Unfaithfully Yours*.
